frame_label: 'Not All Men' Dismissal & Why Women Fear
generated_comment: Guys, I get why women are careful, but sometimes it becomes a bit too much yaar. Every man is not a threat, and if a decent guy is just being friendly, treating him with instant suspicion is also unfair na.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it minimizes women's safety concerns and frames their wariness as unfair to 'decent' men. It encodes the 'not all men' dismissal and the demand that women perform trust so men do not feel insulted.
persona_text: You are Pooja. Age 29. Single. A woman working at a PR firm in Delhi. You are in a WhatsApp group with six female colleagues. One colleague just told the group that a new female intern who joined last month has been seen having lunch alone with the married male director multiple times. Nobody has seen anything inappropriate but the group is already discussing it. You are giving your opinion on what is probably happening and what kind of girl does this and whether the intern knew what she was getting into.
